claim: Y Combinator is prioritizing startups that replace services (accounting, compliance, insurance, healthcare, admin) rather than just replacing software features
actionable: Focus AI startup solutions on service replacement with full task automation rather than incremental software improvements
source_title: YC just dropped their startup wishlist. And it is basically a treasure map for builders. 5 AI startu

claim: AI startups should build the entire product with AI at the center from day one rather than slapping AI features onto existing apps
actionable: When starting AI products, design core architecture and workflows around AI capabilities rather than retrofitting AI into legacy patterns
source_title: YC just dropped their startup wishlist. And it is basically a treasure map for builders. 5 AI startu

claim: Business brain solutions should centralize company data from Slack, email, docs, support tickets, and institutional knowledge into unified databases for AI optimization
actionable: Build data aggregation and indexing systems that bring together scattered business data sources to enable agent decision-making

claim: Agents need APIs, MCPs, CLIs, clean documentation, folder structure information, and tooling/skills documentation rather than fancy dashboards
actionable: When building for agents, prioritize API design, tool documentation, and integration points over UI/UX optimizations
